About Me

Turning Ideas Into Digital Results

I am Ahmad Hasham, a BS Computer Science graduate from Peshawar, Pakistan with real hands-on experience in SEO, WordPress development, digital marketing, and office administration.

At WebQueenz, I managed on-page and off-page SEO, built and maintained WordPress websites for clients, created marketing graphics using Canva, executed digital campaigns, and oversaw Peshawar branch operations.

My goal is simple: help businesses rank higher, look professional online, and reach more customers through smart SEO and clean web solutions.

What I Offer

Professional Services

SEO Optimization

On-page and off-page SEO, keyword research, and website optimization to improve rankings and drive organic traffic.

WordPress Development

Custom WordPress websites, theme customization, plugin management, and maintenance for a professional online presence.

Digital Marketing

Strategic campaigns to grow your brand, increase visibility, and generate more leads online.

Social Media Management

Managing and growing your social presence with engaging content and consistent posting strategies.

Content Writing

SEO-friendly content that resonates with your audience and helps your website rank higher in search results.

Graphic Design

Professional marketing creatives, social media graphics, and visual content using Canva for your brand.

Keyword Research

In-depth research to identify high-value keyword opportunities and help you outrank your competitors.

Content Creation

Engaging content tailored for your brand voice, audience, and marketing goals across all platforms.

Why Work With Me?

Client Focused

I prioritize understanding your business goals and delivering solutions that genuinely help you succeed online.

SEO Driven

Every project is built with SEO best practices in mind, from site structure to content optimization.

Clear Communication

You will always know the status of your project. Transparent, timely and professional communication.

Result Oriented

Focused on outcomes that matter: better rankings, more traffic, and stronger online presence.
